subject: Cannot log in after password reset
body: I clicked 'Forgot password' and received the email but by the time I clicked the link it said it was expired. I tried again twice and the same thing happened.

subject: App crashes when switching between projects on iPhone
body: I'm on iOS 17.4. Every time I quickly switch between two projects the app freezes and I have to force close it. This is happening multiple times a day.

subject: Invoice for October not received
body: I usually get our invoice on the 1st but it's now the 5th and I haven't received anything. We need it for our accounts payable process.

subject: CSV export missing custom field data
body: When I export our records to CSV the 'Priority' and 'Region' custom fields are blank even though they have values in the app.

subject: Entire team locked out — SSO not working
body: Since this morning nobody in our company can log in. We get an error: 'Identity provider returned an unexpected response'. This is blocking our whole team.

subject: Slack notifications stopped working after renaming workspace
body: We renamed our Slack workspace last week and now we no longer receive any Acme notifications in Slack.

subject: Dashboard takes over 10 seconds to load
body: Our workspace has grown to about 12000 records and the main dashboard now takes 10-15 seconds to load every time. This is really slowing us down.

subject: Can you add a dark mode option?
body: Would love a dark mode for the web app. My eyes get tired working in the evening. Not urgent just a suggestion!
